migrations: Integrated 12 baselines (GCN, SAGE, GAT, HGT, TemporalGNN, Percolation, Fuzzy-GAT, and QF-HGT variants) under a common API.
Synchronized packaging directories for aethergrid_core, evaluation, and sovereign_watchdog to resolve imports correctly.
Integrated Local JSON Run Registry to track seeds, configurations, resources, and evaluation statistics.
measured_limitations: Quantum-fuzzy VQC attention features require high simulation latency when run classically (default.qubit backend).
known_risks: Sensor dropout exceeding 50% leads to significant degradation of classification AUROC and calibration quality.
starting_point_for_next_prompt: Commit: Complete prompt 7 implementation of baseline and experiment registries, experiment matrix, and CI regression checks. Ready for manuscript final review.
